headline: TRU Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong U.S. Financial Services
summary: TransUnion beat Q1 estimates as U.S. Financial Services and broader U.S. momentum lift revenues 13.7% y/y, with AI and mortgage strength adding tailwinds.
